text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Asahi Hai F.S. drawing closer,
Maruzensky is enjoying her time training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Special Week and Grass Wonder
request to practice alongside their role model,
Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moved by the passion of the younger students,
Maruzensky gets even more fired up for the Asahi
Hai F.S.!
